modelName: Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan 24cm
description: The De Buyer Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan, 24cm variant, is a premium choice for professional kitchens requiring high-heat searing and caramelisation. This specific model features a signature organic beeswax finish, which protects against oxidation and facilitates the seasoning process. It includes a heavy-duty carbon steel body, an ergonomic riveted steel handle for durability, and is compatible with all hobs, including induction. This variant is designed without chemical coatings, ensuring a natural non-stick surface develops over time with proper maintenance and oil seasoning.
features: Material: White carbon steel (99% iron); Thickness: 2.5mm; Handle: Riveted French-style ergonomic steel strip handle; Thermal Conductivity: High responsiveness to heat changes; Heat Source Compatibility: All hobs including induction; Oven Safe: Flash oven use (up to 200°C for 10 minutes max).
uses: Searing steaks, frying eggs (once seasoned), browning vegetables, Maillard reaction development, grilling meats.

accessories.name: Pan Body
accessories.description: 24cm carbon steel vessel with beeswax coating

name: De Buyer Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan 24cm
